_meta.description: Curated content blocks per community. Edit this file via the GitHub web UI to update what shows on each community page. Each block is optional — leave any field blank or remove the key and the site falls back to a polished empty state.

blockTypes.edaNote: 1-paragraph insider voice from Eda. Original first-person content.
blockTypes.schoolSpotlight: { name, body } — featured A-rated school. Refresh quarterly.
blockTypes.placeOfMonth: { name, body, url? } — restaurant, park, or local landmark of the month.
blockTypes.openHouses: Array of { address, date (ISO), time, url? } — upcoming open houses this week.
